name: eval-standup
description: 2-speaker sprint-standup script. Turn order IS the diarization ground truth; the vocab payoff is denser here (names + tech jargon: Recato, Kavya, Devansh, Bangalore, Grafana, Kubernetes).

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Morning. Did the Recato build pass on staging?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: It did, but Kavya flagged a flaky test in the auth module.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Is that blocking the Bangalore demo on Friday?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: Not yet. I'll rerun it and check the metrics in Grafana.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Okay. Can you sync with Devansh about the dashboard?

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: Sure. He's pushing the Kubernetes config this afternoon.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Great. Let's keep the standup to ten minutes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.text: Agreed. I'll post the notes in the channel.

turns.speaker: A
turns.text: Perfect. Ping me if the test fails again.
